ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sound_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sound event */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source where the sound event was captured */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sound event occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sound event was captured */,
  "sound_data" TEXT /* Array of sound data values */,
  "sound_type" TEXT /* Type of sound event (e.g., noise, alarm, speech) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the sound event data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the sound event */,
  "frequency_range" TEXT /* Range of frequencies in the sound event */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity level of the sound event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for initial classification */,
  "is_analyzed" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the event has been analyzed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sound_events_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sound_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sound_events_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sound_events_sound_type FOREIGN KEY ("sound_type") REFERENCES sound_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sound_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sound source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the sound source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of sound source (e.g., microphone, sensor) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sound source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the sound source */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the source was installed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sound source */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sound source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sound source (e.g., active, maintenance, offline) */,
  "calibration_data" TEXT /* Calibration data for the sound source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sound_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sound type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sound type (e.g., Noise, Alarm, Speech) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sound type */,
  "is_predefined" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the sound type is predefined */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sound type (for hierarchical sound types) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sound_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sound data value */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sound event the data belongs to */,
  "data_value" INTEGER /* Value of the sound data */,
  "data_position" INTEGER /* Position of the sound data in the array */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the sound data value */,
  "amplitude" REAL /* Amplitude of the sound data value */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the sound data value (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sound_data_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES sound_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, engineer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sound event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sound event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the sound event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the sound event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES sound_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sound_event_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sound event */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the sound event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* JSON object describing the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed this version */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the version review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sound_event_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sound_event_versions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES sound_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sound_event_versions_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the location (e.g., latitude, longitude) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., CNN, RNN) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data used for the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "last_trained_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last trained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for prediction */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sound event being predicted */,
  "predicted_type" TEXT /* Predicted type of the sound event */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was made */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the prediction has been confirmed by a human */,
  "confirmed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who confirmed the prediction */,
  "confirmed_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_confirmed_by FOREIGN KEY ("confirmed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES sound_events ("event_id")
)
